_doc: Authorized cross-read (#666) of wirbel #682 (run ezvgx3et, wirbel/specbreak-VERDICT) -- AGGREGATE retention only. #694 reconciles its targeted enriched-subset flip directionality against this aggregate symmetric-reshuffle claim. NOT a fire, does NOT relax #319.
reconciliation_logic: #682 is aggregate over ALL breaks (~128 prompts); high retention (worst 0.957 gpqa) with high token_break_rate (0.517) => most token-level breaks heal at the answer level, net quality ~= preserved (symmetric reshuffle, R2W ~= W2R, zero new 515-gate failures). #694 deliberately enriches for the answer-THREATENING tail (content-forks incl. seq_ratio 0.0, + sharpest gpqa/aime heals), so #694 flip rate is an UPPER-tail probe, expected >= #682 aggregate. Consistency test: even on the worst forks, if answers mostly PRESERVE, or if flips are BENIGN/net-neutral (R2W ~= W2R), that corroborates #682. A large net-R2W excess on the enriched subset that #682's aggregate retention cannot accommodate would be the only inconsistency.
